title: Senior Software Engineer - Lendingkart Capital India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Lendingkart Capital India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Lendingkart Capital India has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Navi Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Lendingkart Capital India:
Lendingkart Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lendingkart Capital India!
